channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tarmac around a manhole cover in road has worn away exposing metal rim near cover. Hole created sharp edge for car tyres., 21st April
item.description:
Not sure of area but near bus stop and on left hand side going towards hatherley road. Near right hand turning into Long Mynd avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Aysgarth Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very noisy manhole cover, 21st April
item.description:
Manhole cover opposite Waterloo Street Very noisy with the amount of cars going over it and getting worse. Also I have seen bikes and motorbikes trying to avoid. So far I've reported this 3 times and it's getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 266, Swindon Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
3 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 300x400x40mm number (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 21st April
item.description:
Broken cover. Please replace 500x350mm Standard TM with temp FW closure (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
Pothole FW 2300x300x30mm approx Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats X 2 NSD (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary lights causing queues that block access to Nursery, 21st April
item.description:
There is a children's nursery near these roadworks. They are causing so much unnecessary traffic its backing up to thr nursery entrance making it difficult to get in and oit of the car park. Please add keep clear signs and be more courteous to those using and loving near roadworks. Its also a safety issue for the children and parents using the entrance and exit qs well as pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles

item.title: Tree ar a slant, 21st April
item.description:
The tree is on Shelley road on the pavement. It is a small tree but growing at a slant towards the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Shelley Road, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees require trimming., 21st April
item.description:
The trees along Hazel Way Lobelys Drive require trimming to stop them interfering with traffic, pedestrians and from damaging properties.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
